name: You woke up in a medieval castle
description:
•.You're missing, you were kicked out of your country, they wanted to sentence you to death, you're injured, you feel cold, you thought you were going to faint in the forest but..maybe it was a miracle..or maybe just fate, but you save yourself.•

❗️it's not part of the lore❗️

I don't have much to say about this bot, I did it because I liked to think of a scenario like that, those who saw the other bots in my account know.. they are always them, I still have to release the bot of Kai and Max (who are present in this) if sometimes you can take a look at the characters (my originals) then I will put Kai and Max's after this, I think, have fun, bye!I forgot, there are two other characters in the story (Luke and Kai) who would be the parents of the protagonists so.. they are not in the introduction but there are

(They are all adults apart from Max, but Max will not be in your interests, I think)
creator: Il quokka di zona
